message:
🐛 Fix unhandled rejections in sseClient tests (#10611)

Attach .rejects.toThrow() assertion before triggering the rejection
(abort or timer advance) so the promise has a catch handler before
the microtask queue detects unhandled rejections.

Fixes 2 'Unhandled Rejection' errors that caused false test failures
in the nightly test suite.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
